_meta.generatedBy: Masters 2026 bundle refresh — predictions from Bovada winner market (2026-03-29); rankings from DG global rankings (time-stable across weeks); courseFit cleared (no Augusta course-fit data available)
_meta.sourceStrategy: This snapshot was generated from the live Supabase DG cache by the bundled-snapshot refresh endpoint. It contains real DataGolf data (rankings, SG metrics, course-fit scores, predictions, field). This is a last-resort fallback only — the live Supabase cache (24h TTL) is the primary source. Do not use this snapshot to make picks directly; it may be stale relative to current tournament.

sourceDetails.honestLimitations: Predictions are Bovada-implied win probabilities (not DG model output). CourseFit cleared — no Augusta course-fit data from DG. Rankings are global DG skill ratings (valid across tournaments).

_meta.honestLimitations: Rankings are global DG skill ratings and are valid across weeks. Predictions are Bovada-implied win probabilities — NOT actual DataGolf predictions. CourseFit is empty (no Augusta course-fit from DG). This snapshot is used when Supabase + /tmp both fail.
